branding.aboutBody: Voice Recognition Australia has been the trusted Dragon NaturallySpeaking reseller for Australian medical practices, law firms, government agencies and enterprises since 1999. From the original Dragon Dictate to today's Dragon Professional and Dragon Medical One, we provide local onboarding, training and ongoing support.

branding.legacyBody: Dragon NaturallySpeaking and Dragon Dictate were the original product names used by Nuance Communications for over two decades. Many Australian professionals still search for Dragon NaturallySpeaking when looking for speech recognition software. The product range has been updated and rebranded - but the technology is better than ever.

products.title: Dragon Medical One
products.metaTitle: Is Dragon Medical One Right for Your Practice? | Australian GP Guide
products.metaDesc: Honest guide to Dragon Medical One for Australian GPs and specialists. 80+ specialty vocabularies, Best Practice and Medical Director integration. Free trial available.
products.schemaDescription: Cloud-based medical speech recognition platform with 80+ built-in specialty vocabularies. No voice training required. Used by Australian GPs, specialists and hospitals.
products.headline: Dragon Medical One - Cloud Speech Recognition for Australian Clinicians
products.subheadline: The cloud-based medical speech recognition platform trusted by clinicians worldwide. 80+ built-in medical specialty vocabularies. No voice profile training needed. Dictate from any device, anywhere. Hosted on Microsoft Azure.
products.priceNote: Subscription - volume discounts for practices and hospitals
features: 80+ built-in medical specialty vocabularies (cardiology, radiology, pathology, oncology, general practice and more)
Cloud-based - dictate from any Windows, Mac, iOS or Android device
No voice profile training required - accurate transcription from first use
EHR and clinical system integration (Best Practice, Medical Director, hospital systems)
AutoText and custom commands for clinical templates and common phrases
Automatic updates - always the latest vocabulary and accuracy improvements
Centralised administration for practices and hospital departments
Dragon Anywhere Mobile companion app for dictation on the go

faqs.q: Is Dragon Medical One suitable for Australian GPs?
faqs.a: Yes. Dragon Medical One is used extensively by Australian GPs, specialists, and hospital clinicians. It includes specialty vocabularies for general practice, cardiology, radiology, oncology and many more. Contact us for a demonstration with your specific clinical software.

faqs.q: Does it integrate with Best Practice and Medical Director?
faqs.a: Dragon Medical One integrates with major Australian clinical software including Best Practice, Medical Director and hospital EHR systems. Contact us to confirm compatibility with your specific setup.

faqs.q: How is Dragon Medical One different from Dragon Professional?
faqs.a: Dragon Medical One is cloud-based with 80+ medical specialty vocabularies built in. Dragon Professional 16 is a locally installed desktop product designed for general professional use. Medical One requires no voice training and includes medical-specific EHR integrations.

faqs.q: What happened to Dragon Medical Practice Edition?
faqs.a: Dragon Medical Practice Edition (DMPE) has been discontinued by Nuance/Microsoft. Dragon Medical One is the current replacement with significant improvements including cloud access, no voice training, and automatic updates. VRA can help migrate from DMPE.

faqs.q: Can I trial Dragon Medical One?
faqs.a: Yes. Voice Recognition Australia offers a free trial of Dragon Medical One. We can arrange a demonstration in your clinical environment, including integration testing with your EHR system.

faqs.q: What are the security considerations?
faqs.a: Dragon Medical One is hosted on Microsoft Azure. For Australian healthcare organisations, discuss specific compliance requirements with our team during the evaluation process.

products.ctaSectionHeading: Ready to see Dragon Medical One in your practice?
products.ctaSectionBody: Voice Recognition Australia has deployed Dragon Medical One in Australian GP practices, specialist clinics and hospital departments. Tell us about your clinical environment and we will arrange a demonstration.

products.title: Dragon Professional 16
products.metaTitle: Dragon Professional 16 Explained | Features, Pricing and Who It Suits
products.metaDesc: Everything you need to know about Dragon Professional 16. Perpetual $994, upgrade $495, subscription $695/yr. Works offline. Compare options and find the right fit.
products.schemaDescription: Professional speech recognition software for Windows. Perpetual licence. Dictate into any Windows application, transcribe single-speaker recordings, automate workflows. Works offline after activation.
products.headline: Dragon Professional 16 - Desktop Speech Recognition for Windows
products.subheadline: The locally installed professional speech recognition suite for Windows 10 and 11. Dictate into any application, transcribe single-speaker recordings, and automate workflows with custom voice commands. Works offline after activation.
products.priceNote: AUD inc GST - one-time perpetual licence. Upgrade from v15: $495. Subscription from $695/yr.
features: Real-time dictation into Word, Outlook, and hundreds of Windows applications
Transcribe single-speaker audio recordings (MP3, WAV, WMA, DSS, DS2)
Custom vocabulary - add industry terms, names, and shortcuts
AutoText - speak a short phrase to insert a full paragraph
Voice macros to automate multi-step Windows workflows
Works offline after installation and activation
Hands-free PC control, navigation, and mouse control
Windows 10 and Windows 11 (32-bit and 64-bit) compatible
Compatible with Microsoft 365, Google Docs, and Microsoft Teams

faqs.q: Does Dragon Professional 16 require internet to use?
faqs.a: No. After installation and activation, Dragon Professional 16 operates without an internet connection. An internet connection is required only for the initial download and product activation.

faqs.q: Can it transcribe audio recordings?
faqs.a: Yes - single-speaker recordings only. Supported formats include MP3, WAV, WMA, DS2, and DSS. It cannot transcribe multi-speaker conversations or meetings.

faqs.q: Which microphone should I use?
faqs.a: Dragon works with a range of USB and 3.5mm microphones. A dedicated dictation microphone or USB headset provides the best accuracy. Apple AirPods are not supported for dictation.

faqs.q: Does it work with Microsoft Teams?
faqs.a: Dragon Professional 16 includes support for dictating into Microsoft Teams. Some advanced voice commands may have limitations in Teams Home edition.

faqs.q: What is the difference between perpetual and subscription?
faqs.a: The perpetual licence ($994) owns the software outright but your voice profile is stored locally. The subscription ($695/yr auto-recurring) stores your profile in the cloud so it syncs to any PC, includes all new versions automatically, and allows unlimited PC installs.

faqs.q: Can I upgrade from an older version?
faqs.a: The upgrade ($495) is available for Dragon Professional Individual or Group version 15 only. It is not valid for older versions or other editions such as Dragon Home.

products.ctaSectionBody: Voice Recognition Australia has deployed Dragon Professional across Australian government, legal, and enterprise environments for 25 years. We can help you choose the right version and get set up quickly.
ctaSectionBullets: Which licence type suits your needs

products.title: Dragon Professional Anywhere
products.metaTitle: Dragon Professional Anywhere vs Desktop | Cloud vs Local Comparison
products.metaDesc: Should you choose Dragon Professional Anywhere (cloud) or Dragon Professional 16 (desktop)? Compare features, pricing and deployment for Australian enterprise.
products.schemaDescription: Cloud-native professional speech recognition for enterprise. Supports Citrix and virtual desktop environments. Voice profile syncs across devices. Annual subscription.
products.headline: Dragon Professional Anywhere - Cloud Speech Recognition for Enterprise
products.subheadline: Cloud-native speech recognition designed for enterprise and distributed teams. Always up to date, works in virtual desktop and Citrix environments, with centralised administration via Nuance Management Centre.
products.priceNote: AUD inc GST per year - annual subscription (auto-recurring). Single purchase $795.
features: Cloud-based - always the latest version, no local installation management
Anchor dictation - dictate into any Windows application from a floating dictation box
Virtual desktop and thin client support (Citrix, RDP environments)
Centralised administration via Nuance Management Centre (NMC)
Voice profile roaming - your profile follows you across devices
Dragon Anywhere Mobile app included for iOS and Android dictation
Custom vocabulary, AutoText, and voice commands
Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Teams integration
12 months email support and self-deployment guides included

faqs.q: Does Dragon Professional Anywhere work offline?
faqs.a: No. Dragon Professional Anywhere is a cloud-native product that requires an internet connection to function. For offline operation, Dragon Professional 16 is the appropriate choice.

faqs.q: Does it support Citrix and virtual desktops?
faqs.a: Yes. Dragon Professional Anywhere is designed for virtual desktop infrastructure including Citrix and Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) environments. Contact us for deployment guidance.

faqs.q: What is the difference between single purchase and subscription?
faqs.a: Both give you full access for 12 months. The single purchase is $795 one-off. The annual subscription auto-renews at $695/yr - saving $100 per year. The subscription is better value if you plan to continue beyond the first year.

faqs.q: Can I use it on mobile devices?
faqs.a: Yes. Dragon Professional Anywhere includes the Dragon Anywhere Mobile companion app for iOS and Android, allowing you to dictate on the go with the same voice profile.

faqs.q: What is the Nuance Management Centre?
faqs.a: NMC is a server-based administration tool for IT teams to centrally manage Dragon deployments - assigning licences, managing user profiles, distributing custom vocabulary, and monitoring usage across the organisation.

faqs.q: Are discounts available for multiple users?
faqs.a: Yes. Discounts are available for 5 or more users. Contact us for volume pricing tailored to your organisation.

products.ctaSectionHeading: Ready to deploy Dragon Professional Anywhere?
products.ctaSectionBody: Voice Recognition Australia has experience deploying Dragon Anywhere in government departments, legal chambers, and enterprise environments. Tell us about your infrastructure and we will provide a tailored recommendation.

formPlaceholders.context: Your infrastructure (Citrix, RDP, etc) and deployment needs

products.title: Dragon Legal Anywhere
products.metaTitle: Best Speech Recognition for Australian Lawyers | Dragon Legal Review
products.metaDesc: Dragon Legal Anywhere review for Australian law firms. Built-in legal vocabulary, $745/yr. Compare with Dragon Professional and alternatives for legal dictation.
products.schemaDescription: Cloud-based speech recognition platform built for the legal profession. Built-in legal vocabulary covering court terminology, legislation, case law citations and legal drafting conventions.
products.headline: Dragon Legal - Speech Recognition for Australian Law Firms
products.subheadline: Dragon Legal Anywhere is the cloud-based speech recognition platform built specifically for the legal profession. Built-in legal vocabulary covers court terminology, legislation, case law citations, and legal drafting conventions.
products.priceNote: AUD inc GST per year - auto-recurring subscription (save $100 vs $845 single purchase). Volume pricing available for 5+ users.
features: Built-in legal vocabulary - court terminology, legislation, case law citations, legal drafting
Cloud-based - dictate from any device, anywhere
Custom vocabulary for firm-specific terms, client names, and matter references
AutoText for standard clauses, correspondence templates, and court forms
Centralised administration via Nuance Management Centre
Voice profile roaming across devices
Dragon Anywhere Mobile app for dictation on the go
Microsoft 365 and document management system integration

faqs.q: What is the difference between Dragon Legal and Dragon Professional?
faqs.a: Dragon Legal Anywhere includes everything in Dragon Professional Anywhere plus built-in legal vocabulary covering court terminology, legislation, case law citations and legal drafting conventions.

faqs.q: Is there a desktop version of Dragon Legal?
faqs.a: Dragon Legal Anywhere is cloud-based. For locally installed desktop use with legal vocabulary, Dragon Professional 16 can be customised with legal terms via custom vocabulary - though this requires manual setup rather than built-in legal dictionaries.

faqs.q: What is the difference between single purchase and subscription?
faqs.a: Both give you full Dragon Legal access for 12 months. The single purchase is $845 one-off. The annual subscription auto-renews at $745/yr - saving $100 per year. The subscription is better value if you plan to continue beyond the first year.

faqs.q: Can it integrate with legal practice management software?
faqs.a: Dragon Legal Anywhere works with Windows applications including common legal practice management and document management systems. Contact us to discuss compatibility with your specific software.

faqs.q: How does firm-wide deployment work?
faqs.a: Dragon Legal Anywhere is managed via the Nuance Management Centre (NMC). IT teams can provision users, distribute shared vocabulary and AutoText, manage licences, and monitor usage across the firm.

faqs.q: Are discounts available for firms with multiple users?
faqs.a: Yes. Volume pricing is available for firms with 5 or more users. Contact us for a tailored quote based on your firm size.

products.ctaSectionHeading: Ready to deploy Dragon Legal in your firm?
products.ctaSectionBody: Voice Recognition Australia has deployed Dragon in Australian legal chambers, law firms, and government legal departments. Tell us about your practice and we will provide a tailored recommendation.

products.title: Dragon Professional 16 Student Edition
products.metaTitle: Dragon for Students and NDIS | Australian Education Pricing Guide
products.metaDesc: Dragon Professional 16 Student Edition $545 AUD. Full version for students, educators and NDIS participants. Ideal for dyslexia, RSI and accessibility needs.
products.schemaDescription: Full Dragon Professional 16 speech recognition software at discounted pricing for Australian students and educators. Perpetual licence, no feature restrictions.
products.headline: Dragon Software for Education - Student and Educator Pricing
products.subheadline: The complete Dragon Professional 16 at a discounted price for students, educators and educational institutions. Dictate essays, assignments, research notes and course materials faster and more accurately than typing. Widely used for accessibility and assistive technology needs.
products.priceNote: AUD inc GST - perpetual licence. Save $449 vs full price ($994).
features: Full Dragon Professional 16 - identical to the $994 version
Real-time dictation into Word, Google Docs, email and any Windows application
Transcribe single-speaker audio recordings (MP3, WAV, WMA, DSS, DS2)
Custom vocabulary - add subject-specific terms, names and abbreviations
AutoText shortcuts - speak a phrase to insert a full paragraph or citation template
Voice macros to automate repetitive formatting and editing tasks
Hands-free PC control - navigate, click, scroll and select by voice
Works offline after installation and activation
Windows 10 and Windows 11 compatible
Perpetual licence - pay once, own it for your entire degree and beyond

faqs.q: Is the Student Edition the full version?
faqs.a: Yes. The Student Edition is the complete Dragon Professional 16 with no feature restrictions. The only difference from the standard perpetual licence is the discounted price.

faqs.q: Do I need to prove student or educator status?
faqs.a: Contact Voice Recognition Australia when purchasing for specific eligibility requirements and any documentation needed.

faqs.q: Can Dragon help with dyslexia?
faqs.a: Yes. Dragon is widely used as an assistive technology tool for students with dyslexia. Dictating rather than typing removes the spelling barrier, and Dragon can read text back aloud to assist with proofreading.

faqs.q: Can NDIS fund Dragon software?
faqs.a: Dragon is commonly included in NDIS assistive technology plans. Contact Voice Recognition Australia for supporting documentation and quotes formatted for NDIS submissions.

faqs.q: Does it work on Mac?
faqs.a: Dragon Professional 16 is Windows only (Windows 10 and 11). There is no Mac version. Nuance discontinued Dragon for Mac.

faqs.q: Can I keep using it after I graduate?
faqs.a: Yes. The Student Edition is a perpetual licence - you own it permanently. It continues to work after you graduate or leave your educational institution.

products.ctaSectionBody: Whether you are a student, educator, disability support officer or IT department, we can help you choose the right Dragon product and assist with NDIS or institutional procurement.

benefits.title: Dictate 3x faster than typing
benefits.body: Dragon NaturallySpeaking products convert speech to text at up to 160 words per minute with 99% accuracy from first use. Clinicians, lawyers and business professionals reduce documentation time by 50% or more.

benefits.title: Specialist vocabulary built in
benefits.body: Dragon Medical One includes multiple medical specialty vocabularies. Dragon Legal includes legal terminology. No custom training required - accurate from day one in your professional context.

benefits.title: Cloud or desktop - your choice
benefits.body: Dragon Professional 16 runs fully offline for complete privacy and command control. Dragon Professional Anywhere and Dragon Medical One are cloud-based for anywhere access and automatic updates.

benefits.title: Local Australian support
benefits.body: Voice Recognition Australia has deployed Dragon NaturallySpeaking products in Australian medical practices, law firms and government agencies for 25 years. We provide hands-on onboarding, training and ongoing support - in your timezone.

steps.title: Tell us about your team
steps.text: Let us know your profession, number of users, and whether you prefer desktop or cloud. We recommend the right Dragon product for your workflow.

steps.title: Trial and validate
steps.text: We set up a free trial in your environment. For medical teams, we can demonstrate Dragon Medical One with your EHR system.

steps.title: Deploy with local support
steps.text: We handle licensing, installation and onboarding. Your team is dictating faster within days - with ongoing Australian support.

features.title: Dragon Medical One - built for clinicians
features.body: Dragon Medical One is the cloud-based medical speech recognition solution trusted by clinicians worldwide. With multiple built-in medical specialty vocabularies covering cardiology, radiology, pathology and more, it requires no voice profile training and delivers accurate transcription from day one. Hosted on Microsoft Azure with HIPAA-aligned security.

features.title: Dragon Professional - for business and legal teams
features.body: Dragon Professional 16 and Dragon Professional Anywhere give business and legal professionals the speed and accuracy to eliminate documentation bottlenecks. Custom voice commands, macro automation, full Microsoft 365 integration and centralised team management make Dragon the productivity platform for document-intensive organisations.

faqs.q: Is Dragon NaturallySpeaking still available?
faqs.a: Dragon NaturallySpeaking and Dragon Dictate were the original product names. The current product range includes Dragon Professional 16 (desktop), Dragon Professional Anywhere (cloud), Dragon Medical One (medical) and Dragon Legal Anywhere. All are available through Voice Recognition Australia and we can help you identify which current product matches your previous Dragon NaturallySpeaking version.

faqs.q: What happened to Dragon Dictate?
faqs.a: Dragon Dictate was the Mac version of Dragon NaturallySpeaking. Nuance discontinued Dragon Dictate for Mac. Current alternatives include Dragon Professional Anywhere (cloud-based, works via browser) and Speech Recognition Cloud. Contact us to discuss the best replacement for your Mac workflow.

faqs.q: What is the difference between Dragon Professional 16 and Dragon Professional Anywhere?
faqs.a: Dragon Professional 16 is a locally installed desktop application - it runs fully offline once activated, ideal for users who need command and control or work in secure environments. Dragon Professional Anywhere is cloud-based, always updated, and ideal for virtual desktops and distributed teams.

faqs.q: Is Dragon Medical One suitable for Australian GPs and specialists?
faqs.a: Yes - Dragon Medical One is used extensively by Australian GPs, specialists, and hospital clinicians. It includes specialty vocabularies for general practice, cardiology, radiology, oncology and many more. Contact us for a demonstration with your specific EHR system.

faqs.q: Does Dragon Medical One integrate with Best Practice or Medical Director?
faqs.a: Dragon Medical One integrates with major Australian clinical software including Best Practice, Medical Director and hospital EHR systems. Contact us to confirm compatibility with your specific setup.

faqs.q: Can I trial Dragon before purchasing?
faqs.a: Yes - free trials are available for Dragon Professional 16 and Dragon Professional Anywhere. For Dragon Medical One, we can arrange a demonstration and trial in your clinical environment. Contact our Australian team to arrange access.
